message:
tests: update search surface snapshots for revised footer hint bar

All seven snapshots reflect the keyboard shortcut changes from the
preceding source commit:

- Footer hint bar changed from
    "Enter=open Ctrl+M/Ctrl+X=select Tab=focus F1=help"
  to
    "Enter=open Ctrl+X=select Alt+S=mode Tab=focus"

  This matches:
  1. Ctrl+M removed from TOGGLE_SELECT (now solely Ctrl+X), since
     Ctrl+M is Enter in many terminals.
  2. Alt+S=mode added to advertise the search-mode cycle
     (lexical/semantic/hybrid) in the contextual footer.
  3. F1=help dropped from the default hint set to free horizontal
     space for the more actionable mode hint.

Affected snapshots:
- cassapp_search_surface_active_filters
- cassapp_search_surface_breakpoint_medium
- cassapp_search_surface_breakpoint_wide
- cassapp_search_surface_structure_default
- cassapp_search_surface_theme_dark
- cassapp_search_surface_theme_high_contrast
- cassapp_search_surface_theme_light

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
